steps.title: Use the given form of the linear function
steps.content:
The linear function is $f(x) = 7x + b$, and we are told that $f(8) = 56$. Substitute $x = 8$:
$$7(8) + b = 56$$

steps.title: Solve for $b$
steps.content:
Simplify and isolate $b$:
$$56 + b = 56$$
$$b = 0$$
That is the correct answer.
